::: {.hero-subsection}


# Contact




:::

## Interested in our science, collaborations, resources or working with us? - We are looking forward hearing from you!


::: {.contact-card}



**Email**  
[Email to Pascal Mutz](mailto:pascal.mutz@gmx.de)

**Office**  
Life Environment Research Center Ostrava (LERCO)
University of Ostrava


**Address**  
University of Ostrava - LERCO 
Syllabova, 703 00
Ostrava 3
Czech Republic  


:::
